transcript.text:
[Making a big order once again...]
[They're speechless...]
You can't do that, sis
[Straight from the fire]
[Spicy Webfoot Octopus]
[That size...]
The smokiness is crazy
[Kalguksu] (Knife-cut Noodles)
[Who is this person?]
Is everything okay? Are you stressing about something?
Hello everyone
I'm here at Cheonho-dong today
There's a very famous and affordable webfoot octopus restaurant here
It's the last day of Chuseok (Mid-Autumn Holiday) and I've been craving something spicy because of all the greasy food I had
Ta-da Right over here
Obong Jip 38 Years of Tradition

[On the 2nd floor]
Hello~
There's an Obong Family Special
It's about 4 servings
I had a meal at home before I came out
So I'll keep it simple today
[Let's order]
3 orders of the Stir-fried webfoot octopus
3 servings, right?
No 3 orders of the 2 servings
6 servings And...
Bossam meal (Boiled Pork)
2 servings of Kalguksu noodles
Our portions are big
I eat a lot
[Brain freeze]

We'll to-go the leftovers for you
[Meal is served]
-It's pretty, right? -Yes
I came up with it
-You ordered just to take pictures, right? -No
-How many are coming? -It's all for me
You can't do that, sis
[Very concerned]
[Spicy stir-fried webfoot octopus]
[Bossam] (Sliced Boiled Pork)
Thank you That looks great
Medium, spicy
[Bev on the house]
Pretty people deserve to be treated right
She gave me coca cola on the house
This looks delicious

This is non-spicy
Here's the medium And this is the spicy
It's really big
It's really big and meaty I think it's really cost-efficient
[Seafood Kalguksu] (Knife-cut Noodles)
Thank you
-It's huge! -The sauce is very spicy
-So add it in as you eat -Thank you
This is a huge bowl
This alone looks like 3~4 servings
Let's cut it
It looks really good And it's big!
Non-spicy, but it looks spicy
The smokiness is crazy
This really hits the spot after eating greasy food
Put it on top like this

Looks so good This combo is a first
On the ladle
Too hot
I didn't get a bite
Cold kimchi on top
The soup is tasty!
Tastes great
I love the smokey flavor
The sauce is thick
It's not spicy
Cut it like this This is the right bossam kimchi, it has radish
Bossam and kimchi
That's delicious
Let's go to the next level
It's really big
This is medium-spicy

Mix it well
Let's try it now This is the normal one
Yum!
It's perfect
It has a kick to it But I can see that it can stack up
But this...
The sauce is very unique
You can taste the fire You can even smell it
So smokey
This time
Spicy level?
This is the Spicy one But there's also a Hell one
I feel like I would literally taste hell form that
[I hope this one is okay...]
This is manageable
It's a good kind of spice

It was good with pork
That's spicy It's spicy now!
It's hitting me
It's creeping up
Let's finish the medium
With kalguksu noodles
This is great too
This is nothing special But it's tasty
It goes really well with spicy webfoot octopus
Let's find the octopus~
A bite of bossam
Kimchi tastes great
It's 5 o'clock right now But all the seats will be filled at 6 because of reservations
The food here will help with all the greasy food you had from Chuseok
Is this really 2 servings?
Now I know why people said it's cost-efficient

The head
Putting the octopus in here is good, but
What if I put the noodles in here?
The noodles are not soggy yet
I had kalguksu in Icheon a long time ago
[A very popular video]
Webfoot octopus with noodles That's what I had
It goes so well together And it's delicious
Amazing
I forgot about bossam It's good, but
I keep forgetting because of the other dishes
Look how meaty this is
It's huge
Can't forget about rice
-1 bowl of rice, please -Okay
This sauce goes well with everything

Can I do it? It's a really big bite
Cut the meat up too
Where did my chopsticks go?
[Grabbed a new pair]
This is incredible
You really can't go wrong with this
Take a look at this
They said I can get leftovers to-go But there's nothing to take
I'd love to take the seaweed soup though
It's really good, but I didn't get to eat it
Seaweed fulvescens?
Next time I enjoy eating it
I'm in awe
I didn't know you'd actually finish everything
Other customers recognized you
I guess I was the only one that was worried because I didn't know her

Really?
[Are you serious?]
Is everything okay? Are you stressing? Girls eat when they are
26 years old?
Same age as my youngest But you have a baby face
You're so cute
I'm going to ask you for your number if I stare at you longer
It's 2 servings each 10 servings total
This needs to be on the news
Thanks everyone
How can you eat so much when you're so skinny?
You're not even big You're so skinny! How?!
[Photo time]
It's Tzuyang
OH?!
[It was a great day filled with love and happiness shared with the fans] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
